treatment_timeline.event: Patient admitted with necrotic toes and urinary tract infection.
Vascular surgery consulted; recommended no surgical intervention.
Patient started on Piperacillin-Tazobactam, Vancomycin, and Zosyn.
Patient discharged with home care instructions.

patient_outcome.final_status: Confused but alert and oriented to person, place, and surroundings.
patient_outcome.follow_up_details: Home with service for physical therapy and medication administration.
patient_outcome.long_term_prognosis: Toes may fall off on their own over time.
patient_outcome.patient_perspective: Patient expressed a desire to live and not have a tube for nutrition.
